page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Evidence modeler combines ab intio gene predictions, protein alignments, and transcript alignments into weighted consensus gene structures
page_metadata.biotools__summary: The EVidenceModeler (aka EVM) software combines ab intio gene predictions and protein and transcript alignments into weighted consensus gene structures. EVM provides a flexible and intuitive framework for combining diverse evidence types into a single automated gene structure annotation system.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The EVidenceModeler (aka EVM) software combines ab intio gene predictions and protein and transcript alignments into weighted consensus gene structures. EVM provides a flexible and intuitive framework for combining diverse evidence types into a single automated gene structure annotation system.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: EVidenceModeler (EVM) combines ab intio genetic predictions with protein and transcript alignments in weighted consensus genetic structures.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: The EVidenceModeler (aka EVM) software combines ab intio gene predictions and protein and transcript alignments into weighted consensus gene structures. EVM provides a flexible and intuitive framework for combining diverse evidence types into a single automated gene structure annotation system.
